question_text: A magnetic field exists around a magnet. Which statement is true?

options.label: A
options.text: A magnetic field only exists at the poles of a magnet

options.label: B
options.text: A magnetic field is the space around a magnet where magnetic forces can be detected

options.label: C
options.text: A magnetic field is only visible to the human eye

options.label: D
options.text: A magnetic field exists inside a magnet but not outside it

explanation: A magnetic field is an invisible region of space around a magnet where magnetic forces can act on other magnets or magnetic materials. We can visualise it using iron filings or a compass.
